keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search keywords, e.g. ["iphone case", "usb c hub"]

max_items_per_keyword.title: Max items per keyword
max_items_per_keyword.description: Maximum products to scrape per keyword

country.title: Marketplace
country.description: Amazon site: US, UK, DE, FR, JP

min_rating.title: Min rating
min_rating.description: Filter out products with lower rating; 0 = no filter

min_reviews.title: Min reviews
min_reviews.description: Filter out products with fewer reviews; 0 = no filter

fetch_details.title: Fetch detail pages
fetch_details.description: Open product detail pages for first N items (category, features)

max_detail_items.title: Max detail items per keyword
max_detail_items.description: Max products to open detail page for (when fetch_details is true)
